info.title: SoloX.SlnAggregate
info.description: Aggregate all projects from several solutions in a global solution replacing package references by project references when possible.

commands.name: aggregate
commands.description: Aggregate the projects into one shadow solution.

options.name: --filters
options.description: Filters to match the projects to aggregate.

arguments.name: root path
arguments.description: Root path where to find projects.

commands.name: push
commands.description: Push the modification done in the shadow projects to the original projects.

options.name: --filters
options.description: Filters to match the projects to aggregate.

arguments.name: root path
arguments.description: Root path where to find projects.
